import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_three(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut result = [0, 0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and idx < 3
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          mut cb = 0
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(v)
            cb = v
          when None
            cb = 0
          end
          if cb >= 48 and cb <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (cb - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = replace_at(result, idx, val * sign)
      idx = idx + 1
    end
  end
  result
end

fn replace_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ pos: Int, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    mut cur = 0
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      cur = x
    when None
      cur = 0
    end
    if i == pos
      out = __list_int_push(out, v)
    else
      out = __list_int_push(out, cur)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let vals = parse_three(input)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut s = 1
  match vals.get(0)
  when Some(x)
    a = x
  when None
    a = 0
  end
  match vals.get(1)
  when Some(x)
    b = x
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  match vals.get(2)
  when Some(x)
    s = x
  when None
    s = 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut cur = a
  mut first = true
  while cur < b
    if first
      out = "#{cur}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{cur}"
    end
    cur = cur + s
  end
  println(out)
end
